**Paraguay has pulled off one of the biggest upsets in World Cup history by defeating Germany in a penalty shootout.**

## Context / Background
The 2026 World Cup has seen its fair share of surprises, but none as shocking as Paraguay's win over Germany. The match was closely contested, with both teams creating scoring opportunities. However, it was Paraguay who held their nerve in the penalty shootout to secure a historic win.

## Tactical Key Points / Stats Table
| Team | Shots on Target | Corners | Possession |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Paraguay | 10 | 5 | 42% |
| Germany | 12 | 7 | 58% |

> 'This is a dream come true for us. We worked so hard for this moment, and it's an incredible feeling to have beaten one of the best teams in the world.' - Paraguay Coach

## What's Next?
Paraguay will now move on to the next round of the tournament, where they will face a new challenge. Germany, on the other hand, will head home, disappointed but proud of their efforts.
